item.title: About
item.description:
About Veblenia

Veblenia is a notebook for short writing on institutions, norms, and the structures that shape ordinary life.

item.title: Contact
item.description:

item.title: Proem
item.description:
I will be honest here: I set up this blog because I was curious about how to set up a static blog using GitHub as a host. This came to fruition out of some technical desire. Beyond that, there is no plan going forward.

The name Veblenia is derived from Veblenian, i.e. someone who adheres, in whole or in part, to the institutional economics of Thorsten Veblen. He was a fascinating character, and it would be well worth your time read up on him.
